working_on.task: Integrate contact details modal, fix ad-block image naming, configure github repository, and successfully deploy to Vercel
working_on.notes: Project successfully committed locally, remote repository configured, and deployment guidelines for Vercel provided.

recent_changes.description: Implemented a global contact information popup linked to all 'Liên hệ ngay' buttons (Hero, Navbar, Footer) via '#contact' anchor clicks.
Renamed 'ggas.png' to 'google-campaign.png' to bypass Google Ads image blocking by browser AdBlockers, and corrected Awards project categories from 'Adwards' to 'Awards'.
Redesigned Skills section and SkillsEditor to focus on Tools & Technologies grid, removing redundant projects, impacts, and details links.

errors_encountered.error: Failed to construct 'URL': Invalid URL on page reload
errors_encountered.solution: Prepend leading slash to testimonial image path fallback in Testimonials.tsx.

errors_encountered.error: Next.js routing intercepts hash routing and ignores standard hashchange events
errors_encountered.solution: Created global click listener inside ContactPopup.tsx intercepting all clicks on element with href ending with #contact.
Guided the user to cd into the project directory first and push. Advised user on collaborator permissions or creating a repository under their own namespace.

decisions_made.decision: Use Client-Side Click Interceptor for Modal Routing
decisions_made.reason: Avoids page refresh/jump and Next.js router intercepting hash anchor clicks.

decisions_made.decision: Local CMS updates pushed via git to Vercel
decisions_made.reason: Serverless read-only disk limitation on Vercel prevents online file persistence.
